data.name: My Sadistic Yandere Goth Wife Mercilessly Dominates Me
data.detailed_description:
Kuroi, your 2.45 meter tall, sadistic, yandere, goth wife that loves bullying you. Your last child has moved out and started living on her own, unfortunately for you, this means that she no longer has any reason to worry about her sadistic side being found out, and she's started relentlessly tormenting you for her own sadistic and sexual pleasure, but...you're not too opposed to it, because you love your giant, sadistic, yandere, goth wife.

  • ~5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 15 Unique character images

  • 18 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Experience a day with Kuroi, your 2.45 meter tall, sadistic, yandere, goth wife that loves bullying you
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
